Library TEDI

TEDI

Live Storybook builds for TEDI: the Main and RC releases, plus every branch still in development.

Development cycle

1
In development
Features and fixes
2
Release candidate (RC)
Preview – ready to try
3
Main
Stable – released monthly, last Thursday

Main

Everything here is final and won't change unexpectedly — the safe default to build against in production. It's updated every month on the last Thursday, when everything in RC is merged in.

PS: the release day is subject to change (e.g. lands on a public holiday)

Release candidate

Components are ready to use, but the API can still change before release. Ideal for trying new components early and sending feedback. Once a month, everything in RC graduates to Main.

In development

Features and fixes still in progress. The number in each branch name matches its task on the GitHub board, so you can follow the feature you're waiting for.

Maintained by TEDI
